name: Temple Glider
author: Poki
description: Go on an ancient adventure in Temple Glider! In this game, you play as a clumsy bird that has to try to fly his way through an ancient Egyptian tomb and get to the exit. But watch out! There are plenty of traps and obstacles in your path that you'll have to avoid. This classic Flash game is now back in HTML 5 so you can play it whenever you like! Can you bring the Temple Glider safely to the ground? How to play Temple Glider? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move and fly around! Who created Temple Glider? Temple Glider is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Droplets , In The Doghouse and bucket How can I play Temple Glider for free? You can play Temple Glider for free on Poki. Can I play Temple Glider on mobile devices and desktop? Temple Glider can be played only on your computer.
